architectureDecision.label: Flag + env; validationMode evidence
architectureDecision.rationale: PARITY_TARBALL_PATH env and --from-tarball flag (flag wins); parity evidence adds optional validationMode full|from-tarball.

readyReview.decision: Local parity full chain by default; CI artifact mode via flag/env; evidence validationMode field.

technicalBreakdown: Add --from-tarball and PARITY_TARBALL_PATH to run-parity.mjs (flag overrides env).
CI parity job downloads tarball and runs from-tarball mode only.
Keep local pnpm run parity as full chain when no tarball input.

acceptanceCriteria: Local pnpm run parity runs full validation unless tarball path provided.
CI parity runs against downloaded tarball without rebuild/check/test/pack.
Parity evidence records validationMode full or from-tarball (backward compatible).
Failure output identifies the failing parity step in both modes.
